children.name: ValidateCommand
children.purpose: Check that the command is one of the allowed four and that required fields in message_data are present
children.behavior: If command is not in ['send','history','create_channel','join'], return error. For each command, verify necessary fields exist in message_data.
children.signature: def ValidateCommand(command: str, message_data: dict) -> dict

constraints.description: message_data must contain required fields based on command type

acceptance_criteria.description: Invalid command returns error with success=False
Missing required fields returns error with success=False
Valid command and complete data returns success=True

children.name: SendMessage
children.purpose: Execute the 'send' command: validate membership, store message, update last_seen, notify members
children.behavior: Check user is member of channel via channels store. If not, return error. Store message in messages store with timestamp. Update user's last_seen in users store. Retrieve channel members and prepare notification data (message details).
children.signature: def SendMessage(message_data: dict, channels: Database, messages: Database) -> dict

data_operations.description: Check if user is member of channel

constraints.description: User must be a member of the specified channel

acceptance_criteria.description: Non-member user returns error with success=False
Valid message is stored with correct channel_id, user_id, content, and timestamp
User's last_seen is updated to current timestamp
Notification data includes message details and list of channel members

children.name: GetHistory
children.purpose: Execute the 'history' command: retrieve last 100 messages from a channel sorted by timestamp descending
children.behavior: Query messages store for all messages with given channel_id, sort by timestamp descending, limit to 100, return list.
children.signature: def GetHistory(message_data: dict, messages: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read messages for the specified channel

data_operations.description: Query messages by channel_id, sort by timestamp descending, limit to 100

constraints.description: channel_id must be provided in message_data

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns list of messages sorted by timestamp descending
Each message contains content, user_id, and timestamp

children.name: CreateChannel
children.purpose: Execute the 'create_channel' command: create new channel with unique name, set creator as first member
children.behavior: Check if channel name already exists in channels store. If yes, return error. Generate new channel_id, store channel with name, members=[user_id], created_by=user_id.
children.signature: def CreateChannel(message_data: dict, channels: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read to check name uniqueness, write to store new channel

data_operations.description: Check if channel name already exists
Store new channel with generated ID, name, members, created_by

constraints.description: Channel name must be unique across all channels

acceptance_criteria.description: Duplicate channel name returns error with success=False
New channel is created with unique ID, provided name, creator as first member

children.name: JoinChannel
children.purpose: Execute the 'join' command: add user to channel member list if not already a member
children.behavior: Check if user_id is already in channel's members list. If yes, return error. Otherwise, append user_id to members list and update channels store.
children.signature: def JoinChannel(message_data: dict, channels: Database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read current members list, write updated members list

data_operations.description: Check if user is already a member of the channel
Update channel's members list with new user

constraints.description: User must not already be a member of the channel
channel_id must reference an existing channel

acceptance_criteria.description: Already-member user returns error with success=False
Non-existent channel returns error with success=False
User is added to channel's members list
Returns success=True and updated member count

governance_notes: All children inherit parent's global variable access scopes. ValidateCommand is a pure function with no data store access. SendMessage requires write access to messages and users, and read access to channels. GetHistory requires read access to messages. CreateChannel and JoinChannel require read/write access to channels. No child requires write access to users except SendMessage. All children must respect the parent's constraint that only valid commands proceed to execution.
